description: Wave 3 (6) Slice 5a graduation forced-reachability seed. Three empty Python package __init__.py files need one-sentence module docstrings so the packages are self-documenting. This is a deterministic, low-risk, multi-file trivial edit designed to walk through CLASSIFY -> ROUTE -> CTX -> PLAN -> GENERATE (multi-file candidate shape) -> the post-GENERATE parallel_dispatch seam, exercising enforce-mode fan-out when JARVIS_WAVE3_PARALLEL_DISPATCH_ENABLED and ...ENFORCE are both true. Edit: in each of the three target files, add a single triple-quoted module docstring on line 1 - one short sentence per file describing the package's role. Do not add any code, imports, or exports. Each file's full content after the edit should be exactly one line: a triple-quoted string. This seeds the Wave 3 (6) graduation cadence without accumulating meaningful production side effects; the diff across all three files totals roughly 3 lines of docstring content. Classify as SAFE_AUTO, trivial complexity, blast_radius=3. F2 Slice 3 (2026-04-23): urgency_hint and routing_hint added so that when JARVIS_BACKLOG_URGENCY_HINT_ENABLED=true this seed declares urgency=critical + routing=standard at the schema level, escaping the source=backlog -> BACKGROUND classification trap and enabling the multi-file STANDARD/COMPLEX eligibility path at the post-GENERATE parallel_dispatch seam. Backward-compatible: pre-F2 BacklogSensor ignores both fields.
